Home › Programmes › Post Basic in Infection Control
Post Basic Programme

Post Basic in
Infection Control

The Post Basic in Infection Control is a 6-month professional development course — one of Malaysia's most reputed nursing qualifications. Endorsed by MQA (Fully Accredited) and claimable via HRD Corp (HRDF), the programme prepares registered nurses for specialization in infection prevention and control.

6 Months (Full Time) Intake: Contact Admissions
Special Note: Pregnancy is not permitted during this programme.
Enrol Now

Accreditation

Course Code: PBIC MQA: FA5314 MOHE: KPT(R/723/3/0/150) HRDF Claimable Local Only

Why Choose DIT?

  • ✓ Full scholarship & job placements from partner hospitals
  • ✓ MOHE & MQA accredited programmes
  • ✓ 30+ years affiliated with Damai Service Hospital
  • ✓ Practical placements at approved hospitals

Advantages of Studying at DIT

MOHE & MQA Accredited — All programmes approved by Ministry of Higher Education
PTPTN Loans — Financial assistance available for eligible Malaysian students
Hostel Accommodation — Established condominiums with full facilities nearby
Guaranteed Job Placements — Scholarship partnerships with partner hospitals
Qualified Faculty — Registered lecturers and clinical instructors
30+ Years of Excellence — Affiliated with the established Damai Service Hospital

Entry Requirements

Entry Requirements

Possess Diploma in Nursing from an institution recognised by the Malaysia Nursing Board (MNB)
Registered with the Malaysia Nursing Board (MNB)
Possess current Annual Practicing Certificate (APC) for Nurses from MNB
Minimum TWO (2) years clinical working experience
Additional requirements: Must be medically fit and free from: Mental Health Disorder; Infectious Diseases (HIV-AIDS, Hepatitis B and C); Epilepsy; Colour Blindness; Physical disabilities or Impaired Senses that hinder nursing dexterity; Pregnancy is not allowed during the course

About This Programme

The Post Basic in Infection Control is a 6-month professional development course — one of Malaysia's most reputed nursing qualifications. Endorsed by MQA (Fully Accredited) and claimable via HRD Corp (HRDF), the programme prepares registered nurses for specialization in infection prevention and control.

Course Modules

1Module 1

  • PINS 1012 – Microbiology in Infection Control
  • PINS 1013 – Fundamentals of Infection Control

2Module 2

  • PINS 1023 – Management of Infection Control
  • PINS 1034 – Environment of Health & Nursing Care of Infectious Diseases

3Module 3

  • PBBS 1012 – Communications, Counselling and Medico Legal
  • PICP 1016 – Clinical Placements

Career Prospects

Tutor / LecturerClinical InstructorInfection Control NurseImplement Outreach Programmes on Infection Control

Future Education Pathways

→Bachelors in Public Health
→Masters in Public Health
→Degree / Masters in Nursing
